description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior combines dark and orange-toned wall panels, creating a striking contrast and contemporary aesthetic. The front includes a driveway with a parked vehicle, a paved walkway, and a small landscaped area with trees and shrubs. The rooftop appears to have a partially open or glass-covered section, possibly for a terrace or skylight. The rear of the house includes a covered patio area with outdoor seating and a sun umbrella, enhancing its livability. Surrounding the house are several mature trees, contributing to a suburban or urban neighborhood feel.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, contrasting dark and orange walls, a driveway, and landscaped surroundings. Features include a rooftop terrace, covered patio, and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, large windows, and a vehicle parked outside, with landscaping and trees.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the orange wall, glass-covered rooftop section, and a covered patio with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Back view displaying large windows, a secondary entrance, and more of the paved patio area with trees nearby.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the dark wall panels, driveway, and the integration of landscaping with the house's modern lines.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large glass door, paved steps, and minimal overhang, integrated with the driveway and landscaping.
